query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: An image featuring diagonal streaks of light blue, dark blue, grey, and hints of yellowish-brown. The visual texture is smooth and flowing, suggesting rapid movement or a long exposure. No distinct objects, landscapes, or subjects are visible, only abstract forms created by the interplay of color and direction.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An image defined by heavy intentional blur, creating sweeping diagonal streaks of blue, grey, and yellowish-brown tones. The subject matter is entirely abstracted, rendering any potential scene unrecognizable and resulting in a complete loss of detail and distinct forms, leaving only the motion and color gradients.
